# Afterthought

> Afterthought is an independent design & creative studio based in Indiranagar, Bangalore (India), working internationally. Founded and led by Anurag Gautam and Tina Gidwani, who have worked together since 2018. Every engagement is led by a founder.

Afterthought helps companies build and rethink brands: strategy, identity, naming, packaging, motion, and digital. The studio takes on a small number of projects at a time and publishes essays on design practice several times a week.

## Services

- Brand Identity & Strategy: https://www.afterthought.design/services/
- Naming & Verbal Identity: https://www.afterthought.design/services/
- Motion & Animation: https://www.afterthought.design/services/
- Packaging & Retail Systems: https://www.afterthought.design/services/
- Digital & Web: https://www.afterthought.design/services/
- Campaigns & Creative Direction: https://www.afterthought.design/services/
- Social Media & Distribution: https://www.afterthought.design/services/

## Key pages

- Work / case studies: https://www.afterthought.design/work/
- About the studio: https://www.afterthought.design/studio/
- Journal (essays on design, branding and practice): https://www.afterthought.design/thinking/
- Journal RSS feed: https://www.afterthought.design/feed.xml
- Careers: https://www.afterthought.design/careers/
- Contact / start a project: https://www.afterthought.design/contact/

## Facts

- Type: independent design & creative studio
- Location: Indiranagar, Bangalore 560038, India (clients international)
- Founders: Anurag Gautam, Tina Gidwani
- Hours: IST, responses on a working week
- New journal essays published every week
